entity.label: Hadad
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: An Edomite king who defeated the Midianites (Gen. 36:35; 1 Chr. 1:46).

nodes.label: Hadad
nodes.description: An Edomite king who defeated the Midianites (Gen. 36:35; 1 Chr. 1:46).

verses.text: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.
And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.
And when Husham was dead, Hadad the son of Bedad, which smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.
And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.
